message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 15
  MessageAlign left
  LifeLineBorderColor #888888
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  GroupBorderColor black
  GroupHeaderFontStyle bold
  GroupHeaderBackgroundColor white
  GroupBackgroundColor white
  NoteBackgroundColor #ffffdd
  NoteBorderColor #ddddaa
}

participant halon
participant ios1
participant ios2
participant client

box "SNS operation start" #white
  note over halon,client #ffffdd
    notification [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
  end note

  loop until all ios are ready
    halon -> ios2 : repair status request
    ios2 --> halon : repair status reply
  end loop

  halon -> ios2 : spiel_repair_start
end box

... repair process ...

alt sucessful case
  ios1 --> halon : notify [(pool, repaired), (disk, repaired)]

  box "SNS status query" #white
    loop unil all ios are in IDLE
      halon -> ios2 : repair status request
      ios2 --> halon : repair status reply [IDLE, IDLE]
    end loop

    halon -> client : notify [(pool, REPAIRED), (disk, REPAIRED)]
  end box
else partial repair
  ios1 --> halon : notify [(pool, repair), (disk, repair)]
  note over halon,client #ffffdd
    Abort SNS operation
  end note
else transient disk
  ios1 -> halon : notify [(disk, transient)]
  note over halon,client #ffffdd
    Pause SNS operation
  end note
else failed disk
  ios1 -> halon : notify [(disk, failed)]
  note over halon,client #ffffdd
    Abort SNS operation
  end note
end

@enduml
